settings.heading: Servicing
settings.subtext: Log book and general servicing for all makes and models - done to the manufacturer's schedule, with honest advice and clear, upfront pricing.

settings.title: Warranty Safe
settings.text: We service to the manufacturer's log book schedule, so your new car warranty stays intact.

settings.title: Upfront Pricing
settings.text: You get a clear quote before we start. No surprises and no padded invoices.

settings.title: Honest Rundown
settings.text: We tell you what needs doing now and what can wait, so you can plan ahead.

settings.heading: Servicing That Keeps Your Car Right
settings.body1: Keep your car running at its best with scheduled log book and general servicing. We follow the manufacturer's service schedule to help keep your new car warranty intact and give you a straightforward rundown of anything that needs attention.
settings.body2: Whatever you drive, we service all makes and models with clear, upfront pricing - no surprises when you come to collect your vehicle.
settings.points: Log book & general servicing | Warranty-safe, manufacturer schedule | All makes and models | Clear, upfront pricing
settings.seo_description: Log book and general car servicing in Sunshine West for all makes and models. Warranty-safe, manufacturer-schedule servicing with clear, upfront pricing from Niche Automotive.
settings.strip_sub: Send through your make, model and rego and we'll book you in.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
